title: molinia varia var. litoralis
intro: Molinia varia var. litoralis, also known as Sea Sweet Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. It is native to the coastal regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Molinia varia var. litoralis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
